item.title: At least 9 dead in Madagascar as Tropical Cyclone Gezani hits the Indian Ocean island
item.description: Authorities in Madagascar say at least nine people have died when buildings collapsed as Tropical Cyclone Gezani hit the Indian Ocean island

item.title: WATCH: American families travel to cheer on Team USA at Olympics in Italy
item.description: After Covid restrictions kept loved ones away four years ago, many athletes are now grateful to be surrounded by support.

item.title: Nancy Guthrie case: Person released as search for 'armed individual' continues
item.description: The Pima County Sheriff’s Department and the FBI detained and released an individual after questioning them in connection with Nancy Guthrie's abducti...

item.title: WATCH: Monks on a mission walk 2,300 miles from Texas to DC
item.description: A group of Buddhist monks bearing a message of peace walked into the heart of Washington, D.C., on Tuesday and were greeted by large, joyful crowds as...

item.title: WATCH: Grandson pilots 88-year-old grandmother's 1st flight
item.description: Frances Dahlke took to the skies for her first ever flight with a special person piloting the plane -- her grandson.
